parameters.description: Send notifications to your own XML Webhook destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise xmls:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus channels skip Apprise: the gateway transforms the envelope into the channel-native XML body and POSTs it directly to your webhook.
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your XML webhook (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment XML webhook destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's XML Webhook host (apprise-plus) or full webhook URL (gateway-plus)
